dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Hi, I’m Emma. Today I want to talk about something that helps us every day.
dialogue.chinese: 大家好，我是艾玛。今天我想和大家聊聊一件每天都会帮助我们的事。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: It’s called confidence, the feeling that we can try new things even when they seem hard.
dialogue.chinese: 这叫自信，一种即使事情看起来困难，我们仍敢于尝试的感觉。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Confidence doesn’t come from being perfect; it grows when we keep trying and never give up.
dialogue.chinese: 自信不是来自完美，而是来自我们不断尝试、永不放弃的过程中慢慢增长的。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: When we make a mistake, we can ask ourselves what we learned and how to improve.
dialogue.chinese: 当我们犯错时，可以问自己学到了什么，怎样可以做得更好。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: That small question turns a failure into a step forward, and our confidence gets a little stronger.
dialogue.chinese: 这个小问题把失败变成前进的一步，让我们的自信变得更强大一点。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: It also helps to notice the progress we make, even if it seems tiny at first.
dialogue.chinese: 注意到自己取得的进步也很有帮助，哪怕一开始看起来微不足道。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Maybe we wrote a sentence without a spelling error, or we finished a short exercise on time.
dialogue.chinese: 也许我们写了一个没有拼写错误的句子，或者按时完成了简短的练习。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Those little wins remind us that we are getting better, and that feeling is truly encouraging.
dialogue.chinese: 这些小小的胜利提醒我们正在变得更好，那种感觉真的很鼓舞人心。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: When we feel a bit proud, we can share it with a friend or write it in a small journal.
dialogue.chinese: 当我们感到一点自豪时，可以和朋友分享，或者把这些进步写在小本子里。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Writing down progress makes it easier to look back and see how far we have come.
dialogue.chinese: 把进步写下来，让我们回头看时能清楚地看到自己走过的路。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Remember, every expert was once a beginner who practiced a little each day with patience.
dialogue.chinese: 记住，每位专家曾经都是每天坚持练习一点点、耐心学习的初学者。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: So if a task feels tough, take a deep breath, try one small step, and give it a chance.
dialogue.chinese: 所以如果任务觉得很难，深呼吸，尝试迈出小一步，给它一个机会。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: Soon you will notice more confidence bubbling up inside you, like a warm sunrise.
dialogue.chinese: 很快你会感受到更多的自信在内心涌动，像温暖的朝阳一样。

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.english: You are enough, and every effort you make is proof of your growing strength.
dialogue.chinese: 你已经足够好了，你付出的每一次努力都证明你正在变得更强大。
